title: Trucking company prepares privacy policies and procedures and designates a privacy officer subsequent to settling complaint from former employee
summary: An individual complained that his former employer, a trucking company, had disclosed personal information about him to other trucking firms after his employment was terminated. Following lengthy discussions with the trucking company's legal representatives and the complainant, an agreement was reached by both parties to settle the complai...
dedupKey: trucking company prepares privacy policies and procedures and designates a privacy officer subsequent to settling complaint from former employee|2004-06-15
